debug_info.goal:
case hf₂
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : Meromorphic f
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
f2 :
  circleAverage (fun a => logCounting f (↑a) r + log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x => f x - a) 0‖) 0 1 =
    circleAverage (fun a => circleAverage (fun x => log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r) 0 1
⊢ CircleIntegrable (fun a => log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x => f x - a) 0‖) 0 1

failed_attempts:
apply circleIntegrable_congr_sphere (f₂ := fun _ ↦ 0)
    · intro a ha
      have : a ≠ 0 := by aesop
      rw [show (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f by ext; simp; ring,
        MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt]
      · simp [meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_const, mem_sphere_zero_iff_norm.1 ha]
      · apply meromorphicAt_of_meromorphicOrderAt_ne_zero; simp [meromorphicOrderAt_const this]
      · aesop
      · simp [meromorphicOrderAt_const this, h₂]
    · exact circleIntegrable_const 0 0 1

apply circleIntegrable_congr (f₂ := fun _ ↦ 0)
    · intro a ha
      simp [Metric.mem_sphere] at ha
      have hne : a ≠ 0 := by aesop
      have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
        rw [show (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f by ext; simp; ring]
        apply MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt
        · exact meromorphicAt_of_meromorphicOrderAt_ne_zero h₂.ne.symm
        · rw [meromorphicOrderAt_const, if_neg (neg_ne_zero.mpr hne)]
          exact h₂
      rw [this, norm_neg, ha, log_one]
    · exact circleIntegrable_const 0 0 1

    have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - circleMap 0 1 θ) 0 = -circleMap 0 1 θ := by
